title: iN Insulated Glass Mug 350ml – Double Wall Borosilicate Glass Coffee Cup for Hot & Cold Drinks, Lightweight Heat Resistant Glassware for Latte, Tea, Cappuccino, Iced Coffee, Mocktails & Desserts
features: Premium Borosilicate Glass: Made from high-quality, food-safe borosilicate glass, this 350ml insulated mug offers exceptional clarity, strength, and resistance to thermal shock. Ideal for both hot and cold beverages.
Double Wall Insulation: The double-walled design keeps hot drinks warmer and cold drinks cooler for longer, while preventing condensation and protecting your hands from heat
Lightweight Yet Durable: Weighing only 140g, this glass mug is easy to handle without compromising on durability, making it perfect for daily use at home, in the office, or in cafes
Versatile Use for Any Drink: Perfect for artisan coffee, lattes, cappuccinos, teas, iced coffees, cold brews, mocktails, desserts, and more. Your drinks will look as good as they taste.
Elegant & Modern Design: Crystal-clear glass showcases layered drinks beautifully, making it a stunning addition to your drinkware collection and perfect for Instagram-worthy beverages.
Safe & Easy to Clean: Crafted from food-safe materials and easy to wash by hand or in the dishwasher. Please note: not suitable for microwave use.
Perfect Size for Everyday Enjoyment: Measuring 116 x 83 mm with a 350ml capacity, it’s the ideal size for your favourite beverages while fitting comfortably in your hand.
description: Product Description Crystal Clear Finish Elegant Heat-Resistant Design for Everyday Indulgence Experience the perfect balance of beauty and functionality. This 350ml double-walled glass mug keeps your coffee hot, your iced drinks cool, and your hands comfortably protected. Its crystal-clear finish highlights every layer of your favourite brew. Premium Borosilicate Glass for Clarity & Strength Enjoy your beverages the way they’re meant to be Crafted from high-quality borosilicate glass, this insulated cup is both lightweight and exceptionally durable. Resistant to thermal shock, it withstands temperature changes from steaming hot coffee to chilled cocktails, offering reliability and elegance in every sip. Double-Walled Innovation The double-wall insulation ensures your hot drinks stay warmer for longer and your cold drinks stay refreshingly cool without condensation or burnt fingers. A truly smart solution for modern drinkware. Lightweight Durability Designed for All Drinks, All Seasons From morning lattes to evening mocktails, this versatile 350ml glass mug is your all-in-one companion. Perfect for coffee, tea, iced brews, or desserts, it lets you enjoy every beverage at its best, hot, cold, or beautifully layered.
